creator: val@packett.cool
text:
p/native/bsd/bsd_debug.c:498:8: error: use of undeclared identifier 'KF_TYPE_CRYPTO'; did you mean 'R_LIB_TYPE_CRYPTO'?
                case KF_TYPE_CRYPTO: type = 'c'; break;
                     ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                     R_LIB_TYPE_CRYPTO


KF_TYPE_CRYPTO was dropped in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D27302
